original_frontmatter_snapshot.name: the-fool
original_frontmatter_snapshot.description: Use when challenging ideas, plans, decisions, or proposals. Invoke to play devil's advocate, run a pre-mortem, red team, stress test assumptions, audit evidence quality, or find blind spots before committing. Do NOT use for building plans, making decisions, or generating solutions — this skill only challenges and critiques.
original_frontmatter_snapshot.author: https://github.com/Jeffallan
